sleep_recommendation.guidance: Protect tomorrow recovery: 8h+ sleep opportunity and hard shutdown by 10:15 PM.

key_insight.title: Sleep-pressure spike likely after back-to-back evening load
key_insight.description: Pattern history shows wake anchors around 07:00-07:30 and sleep checks around 22:00. With tonight's 18:30-21:00 lecture and another heavy evening tomorrow, bedtime drift is likely, which can reduce Thursday recovery despite currently strong Whoop recovery.
key_insight.action: Set a hard shutdown at 22:15 both nights and shift non-critical work to tomorrow midday to protect recovery and morning training consistency.
